headline: Earnings Preview: Pentair plc (PNR) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Pentair (PNR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Pentair, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Mizuho  analyst Brett Linzey   maintains Pentair (NYSE:PNR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $100 to $85.
